items.title: Walmart-backed OnePay adds tokens in push to serve ‘new to crypto’ customers
items.whyYouShouldCare: Walmart's OnePay expanding token offerings could enhance crypto accessibility, potentially increasing Solana's user base and transaction volume.

items.title: FTX payout, U.S. jobs: Crypto Week Ahead
items.whyYouShouldCare: FTX's payout developments and U.S. job data could influence market sentiment, impacting liquidity and trading activity for Solana.

items.title: Aave goes live on X Layer, enabling onchain lending for OKX Wallet users
items.whyYouShouldCare: Aave's launch on X Layer for OKX Wallet users may drive on-chain lending activity, benefiting Solana's ecosystem through increased usage and integration.
